Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

Why mix remote_mds_nodsh() with ALWAYS_EXCEPT?  It probably makes more sense to use remote_mds_nodsh() for this, since it will log a better message for why the test is being skipped.

commit.subject: LU-4808 tests: fix check for sanity tests prerequisites
commit.message:
LU-4808 tests: fix check for sanity tests prerequisites

Check of prerequisites for tests that manipulate Lustre servers.

Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Change-Id: I17d0c90356a62976e1b5478588925862b588d7a2
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10295
Tested-by: Jenkins
